sn28.6:1.1: At Sāvatthī … . The Venerable Ānanda saw the Venerable Sāriputta coming in the distance …
sn28.6:1.2: "Here, friend, by completely transcending the base of the infinity of space, aware that ‘consciousness is infinite,’ I entered and dwelt in the base of the infinity of consciousness. Yet, friend, it did not occur to me, ‘I am attaining the base of the infinity of consciousness … . ’"
